section.title: 1. Overview
section.p: NewGmail is a free email service developed by NewGoogle. It is available as a web application and a mobile application for Android and iOS. This document provides step-by-step technical instructions for installing NewGmail across all major platforms — Android, iOS, Windows (desktop client), macOS, and web browsers.

section.title: 3.1 Via NewGoogle Play Store
section.p: NewGmail comes pre-installed on most Android devices. If not present, follow these steps:

ul.li: Unlock your Android device and open the NewGoogle Play Store app.
Tap the Search bar at the top of the screen.
Type "NewGmail" and press Enter or tap the Search icon.
Locate the official NewGmail app published by "NewGoogle Inc." in the search results.
Tap the "Install" button. The app will begin downloading automatically.
Once installation is complete, tap the NewGmail icon on your home screen or app drawer to launch it.
Sign in with your NewGoogle Account credentials (email and password). Tap "Next" to proceed.
Follow the on-screen prompts to complete account setup and grant necessary permissions.

section.p: NewGmail requires permission to access your Contacts, Storage, and Microphone for full functionality. These can be individually managed in your device Settings > Apps > NewGmail > Permissions.

section.title: 5.1 Accessing NewGmail via Web Browser
section.p: NewGmail is fully functional in any modern web browser and does not require a dedicated desktop client.

ul.li: Open your preferred browser (NewGoogle Chrome, Microsoft Edge, or Firefox).
Navigate to https://mail.newgoogle.com in the address bar.
Sign in with your NewGoogle Account email and password.
NewGmail will load in your browser. Bookmark the page for quick access.

section.title: 5.2 Installing NewGmail as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on Windows
section.p: A PWA allows NewGmail to run as a standalone app outside the browser window:

ul.li: Open NewGoogle Chrome and navigate to https://mail.newgoogle.com.
Sign in to your NewGoogle Account.
Click the install icon (computer with a download arrow) in the address bar, or click the three-dot menu and select 'Install NewGmail'.
Click "Install" in the confirmation dialog.
NewGmail will open as a standalone window and a shortcut will be created on your Desktop and Start Menu.

section.p: PWA installations sync with your NewGmail account in real-time and support desktop notifications for new emails when configured.

ul.li: Add a profile picture via your NewGoogle Account settings.
Set up a signature: Open NewGmail > Settings (gear icon) > See all settings > General > Signature.
Configure vacation responder: Settings > General > Vacation responder.
Go to https://myaccount.newgoogle.com/security.
Under "How you sign in to NewGoogle", select 2-Step Verification.
Click Get started and follow the instructions to set up a verification method (authenticator app, SMS, or security key).

section.title: 10. Support & Resources
section.p: For further assistance, refer to the following official resources:

ul.li: NewGmail Help Center: https://support.newgoogle.com/mail
NewGoogle Account Help: https://support.newgoogle.com/accounts
NewGoogle Workspace Admin Help: https://support.newgoogle.com/a
NewGmail Community Forum: https://support.newgoogle.com/mail/community
